name: copilotprompts-vendor-intake-approval-agent
title: Vendor Intake Approval Agent
shortDescription: A governance-first Copilot agent for software and vendor intake triage, approval readiness checks, and stakeholder routing.
longDescription: Vendor Intake Approval Agent standardizes software and vendor request handling by checking intake completeness, scoring risk and business impact, recommending reviewer routing, and producing approval-readiness outputs with clear next actions.
It is designed for operations, procurement, security, and IT stakeholders who need a consistent, auditable process before approving vendor-related requests.
